race.comment: Tough race. TORONADO QUEEN (4) didn't fire down the straight two back then just failed to reel in a huge priced winner here last time. She maps for a sweet run on speed here and shouldn't be far away at each way odds. Wary of EXTRAGALACTIC (8) who resumed with a dominant win over 1000m at Pakenham in fast time. Tough draw out to 1200m but she's clearly come back very well. TORSHEEN (1) just keeps raising the bar, sticking on gamely at big odds behind a top filly in Point Barrow last time out. That form looks strong, she just has to give them all weight. BEL LUPA (12) resumed with an easy maiden win at Pakenham over 1000m and has scope to improve. MARSEPT (10) is still a maiden but resumes here off a nice jumpout win and has shown ability, respecting.
